site.title: Themadhood's Videos
site.tagline: Video projects and visual media under Themadhood Media.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Videos is the video branch under Themadhood Media, focused on visual media projects and releases.

footer.title: Themadhood's Videos
footer.line2: Themadhood's Videos operates under Themadhood Media.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Videos
body: Themadhood's Videos is the video branch within Themadhood Media.
It exists to create and release video projects while keeping everything organized and connected across the Themadhood ecosystem.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: This branch focuses on visual storytelling, project releases, and experimental video content.
When a project does not maintain its own public presence, updates and releases can route through Themadhood Media while staying properly attributed.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
